creator: Lars.Koeller@Uni-Bielefeld.DE
text:
The xmmix port is out of date (1.2pl0). The most current is 1.2pl2 
which can deal with the oss sound kernel module from 4front tecnologies!

Fix: 

Get the latest xmmix source file from

ftp://ftp.netcom.com/pub/tk/tkan/xmmix-1.2/src/xmmix-1.2.tar.gz

make a new md5 checksum in the ports tree, thats all. It compiles 
and runs smooth!
